mapper.sql: select sic.invite_id, sic.invite_code, sic.status, sic.expire_time, sic.used_user_id, sic.used_time, sic.canceled_time, sic.canceled_reason, sic.remark, sic.create_by, sic.create_time, used_user.email as used_user_email, coalesce(creator.nick_name, creator.user_name) as creator_name from sys_invite_code sic left join sys_user used_user on used_user.user_id = sic.used_user_id left join sys_user creator on creator.user_id = sic.create_by

if.test: bo != null and bo.inviteCode != null and bo.inviteCode != ''
bo != null and bo.status != null and bo.status != ''
bo != null and bo.usedUserEmail != null and bo.usedUserEmail != ''
bo != null and bo.creatorName != null and bo.creatorName != ''
bo != null and bo.params != null and bo.params.beginTime != null and bo.params.endTime != null

mapper.select: order by sic.create_time desc, sic.invite_id desc
order by sic.create_time desc, sic.invite_id desc
mapper.update: update sys_invite_code set status = '1', used_user_id = #{usedUserId}, used_time = #{usedTime}, update_time = #{usedTime} where invite_code = #{inviteCode} and status = '0' and (expire_time is null or expire_time > #{now})
